story.iWant: the workflow to generate starter templates directly into the catalog
story.soThat: I have a unified template system from the start

tasks.task: Modify `setup/instructions.md` Phase 4 to change output directory from samples/ to catalog/
Update template generation to create ID-based filenames (title.html not 01-title.html)
Add catalog.json generation after all templates are created
Generate catalog entries with all required metadata fields
Define starter template metadata (use_cases arrays for 6 templates)
Update status.yaml generation to use catalog schema instead of templates schema
Add cleanup step to remove config/samples/ if exists
Add cleanup step to remove config/templates/ if exists

criterion.description: Given I run `/sb:setup` and approve the theme, when sample generation completes, then 6 templates exist in `config/catalog/`: title.html, agenda.html, process-flow.html, comparison.html, callout.html, technical.html

Given templates are generated, when I read catalog.json, then it contains 6 entries with: Unique IDs matching filenames (without .html), Descriptive names and descriptions, Relevant use_cases arrays, source: "setup", created_at timestamps
Given setup completes, when I check status.yaml, then it reflects catalog structure: catalog.directory, catalog.manifest, catalog.count, catalog.templates array with id and name
Given the old directories exist, when setup completes successfully, then `config/samples/` and `config/templates/` directories are deleted

doc.title: Technical Specification: Template Catalog System
doc.snippet: Catalog manifest schema defines version, generated date, lastModified timestamp, and templates array with id, name, description, use_cases, file, preview, created_at, source fields. Starter templates: title, agenda, process-flow, comparison, callout, technical.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown - Epic 11
doc.section: Story 11.2: Refactor Setup Workflow for Catalog
doc.snippet: Refactors setup workflow to output to config/catalog/ with ID-based filenames and generates catalog.json alongside template files. Updates status.yaml schema and removes deprecated directories.

doc.title: Slide Builder Conventions
doc.snippet: Catalog location at .slide-builder/config/catalog/ with catalog.json manifest and *.html template files. Schema documented with all metadata fields. Template IDs use kebab-case slugs.

artifact.reason: Primary file to modify - add catalog_path variable, update samples_dir and templates_dir to catalog_path
Primary file to modify - Phase 4 generates samples, Phase 6.1 copies to templates. Both need refactoring to output to catalog/ with ID-based names and generate catalog.json
Current templates section structure needs updating to catalog structure with directory, manifest, count, and templates array
Existing empty catalog.json from Story 11.1 - setup workflow must populate templates array

ecosystem.name: node
ecosystem.package: Headless browser for screenshots - not used for this story
Google API - not used for this story

internal.dependency: Used in Phase 4 for template HTML generation - invocation pattern unchanged
Workflow execution framework - no changes needed

constraints.constraint: Templates must use CSS variables from theme.json - pattern unchanged from current implementation
Template IDs use kebab-case slugs: title, agenda, process-flow, comparison, callout, technical
Catalog.json uses camelCase keys (per existing JSON convention)
History array must be preserved when updating status.yaml
frontend-design skill invocation pattern in Phase 4 must remain unchanged - only output paths change
No new dependencies required - pure workflow file changes

interface.name: catalog.json schema
interface.signature: {version: string, generated: date, lastModified: ISO-timestamp, templates: [{id, name, description, use_cases[], file, preview, created_at, source}]}

interface.name: status.yaml catalog section
interface.signature: catalog: {directory: string, manifest: string, count: number, templates: [{id, name}]}

interface.name: Starter Template Metadata

tests.standards: No automated test framework exists. Manual validation via running workflows and verifying outputs. Testing is done by executing /sb:setup with test brand assets and verifying: 1) catalog.json is generated with 6 template entries, 2) 6 HTML files exist in config/catalog/, 3) status.yaml has new catalog section, 4) old samples/ and templates/ directories are removed.

locations.location: Browser preview of generated HTML templates

ideas.idea: Run /sb:setup, verify 6 .html files in config/catalog/ with ID-based names (no numeric prefixes)
Read catalog.json, verify schema compliance: version 1.0, templates array with 6 entries, each has id/name/description/use_cases/file/source="setup"/created_at
Read status.yaml, verify catalog section exists with correct structure instead of templates section
Verify config/samples/ and config/templates/ directories do not exist after setup completes
Open each generated template in browser, verify theme CSS variables applied, 1920x1080 dimensions

file.change: Keep samples_dir and templates_dir for backward compatibility during transition (optional cleanup)
Phase 4 Step 4.1: Update slide_specs filenames from "01-title.html" to "title.html" pattern
Phase 4 Step 4.2: Change output path from {config_path}/samples/ to {config_path}/catalog/
Phase 4 Step 4.3: Add catalog.json generation with 6 template entries after slides generated
Phase 4 Step 4.3: Update status.yaml to use catalog schema instead of templates schema
Phase 6.1: Remove copy-to-templates step (catalog IS the templates now)
Phase 6.1: Add cleanup step to remove config/samples/ and config/templates/ if they exist
Phase 6.4: Update final status.yaml output to use catalog structure
At runtime: Replace templates section with catalog section

learnings.learning: Catalog directory established with empty manifest, CONVENTIONS.md documents catalog structure
Template IDs use kebab-case, ISO 8601 timestamps, source field tracks origin
Catalog.json schema already defined - this story must populate the templates array
